description_long: This is a large, modern upholstered armchair with a deep, wide seat and a single armrest on the left side. The chair features a thick, plush seat cushion and a slightly reclined, padded backrest for comfort. Its exterior is covered in a dark, textured woven fabric that gives it a contemporary and durable appearance. The right side of the chair is open, lacking an armrest, which may allow for easier access or pairing with other modular furniture pieces. The base is boxy and solid, with no visible legs, suggesting a sturdy construction. This chair is well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living rooms.
description: A large, modern armchair with a single left armrest, thick cushions, and dark woven upholstery. Its boxy, legless base and open right side give it a contemporary, modular look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, thick cushion, and single left armrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, upholstered back and the boxy shape.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the absence of an armrest and the chair's open side.
